pageContext.name: The Little Mermaid
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are excited to present The Little Mermaid Figurine!  Standing at 9' tall, Ariel is framed by crashing waves and accompanies by her friend Sebastian as seen in the movie The Little Mermaid.  This Ariel figurine has LED lights and requires three (3) AAA batteries.  Disney fans, don't miss your chance to add this Disney collectible to your collection today!
